member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.GetAllVisits(lapo_vms_api.Helpers.QueryParameters)
member.summary: Retrieves all visit records and applies any supplied query filters, paging, or search options before returning the result.
member.param: Query string options used to filter, search, sort, or paginate the visit list.
member.returns: A collection of visit records formatted as visit DTOs.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.GetVisitById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the complete details of a single visit using the visit's unique identifier.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to retrieve.
member.returns: The matching visit record when found; otherwise a not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.CreateVisit(lapo_vms_api.Dtos.Visit.CreateVisitDto)
member.summary: Creates a new visit record together with the nested visitor information, optional identification details, optional worker details, and any submitted visit items.
member.param: The multipart form payload containing the visitor details, visit metadata, and optional items being brought in for the visit.
member.returns: The created visit record with a location header pointing to the visit lookup endpoint.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.CheckOutVisit(System.Int32,lapo_vms_api.Dtos.Visit.CheckOutVisitDto)
member.summary: Checks out an existing visit by setting the checkout time to the current UTC time and updating the visit status to checked out.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to check out.
The payload containing the ID of the admin performing the checkout.
member.returns: The updated visit record when checkout is successful; otherwise a bad request or not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.RescheduleVisit(System.Int32,lapo_vms_api.Dtos.Visit.RescheduleVisitDto)
member.summary: Reschedules an existing visit to a new date and marks the visit status as rescheduled.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to reschedule.
The payload containing the new reschedule date and time.
member.returns: The updated visit record when the visit exists; otherwise a not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.CheckInVisit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks in a pending visit by setting the check-in time to the current UTC time and updating the visit status to checked in.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to check in.
member.returns: The updated visit record when check-in is successful; otherwise a bad request or not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.UpdateVisitTagNumber(System.Int32,lapo_vms_api.Dtos.Visit.UpdateVisitTagNumberDto)
member.summary: Updates the tag number for an existing visit.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to update.
The payload containing the new tag number value.
member.returns: The updated visit record when the visit exists and the payload is valid; otherwise a bad request or not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.RejectVisit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks in a pending visit by setting the status to rejected.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to reject.
member.returns: The updated visit record when reject is successful; otherwise a bad request or not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitController.UpdateVisitStatus(System.Int32,lapo_vms_api.Model.VisitStatus)
member.summary: Updates the status of an existing visit to the supplied status value without modifying any other visit details.
member.param: The unique ID of the visit to update.
The new visit status to persist.
member.returns: The updated visit record when the visit exists; otherwise a not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitorController.GetAllVisitors(lapo_vms_api.Helpers.QueryParameters)
member.summary: Retrieves the list of registered visitors and applies any supplied query filters, paging, or search options before returning the result.
member.param: Query string options used to filter, search, sort, or paginate the visitor list.
member.returns: A collection of visitor records formatted as visitor DTOs.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitorController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the details of a single visitor using the visitor's unique identifier.
member.param: The unique ID of the visitor to retrieve.
member.returns: The matching visitor record when found; otherwise a not found response.

member.name: M:lapo_vms_api.Controllers.VisitorController.CreateVisitor(lapo_vms_api.Dtos.Visitor.CreateVisitorDto)
member.summary: Creates a new visitor record from multipart form data, uploads the supplied photo, and stores the generated photo path with the visitor details.
member.param: The visitor payload containing personal details, visitor type, and the photo file to upload.
member.returns: The newly created visitor record when validation succeeds; otherwise a bad request response.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
